content: Daddy, chill. I play PvP on my own. I really like the game mode even though it is not perfectly balanced. I like PvP in this game. You sound like you speak for all of us, but the only thing I see is your personal meltdown

Bro, just to clarify, my English isn't great and this translation was done with AI assistance. If any parts are unclear, please let me know and I'll gladly clarify.
 
I realize my tone came off badly. I'm not saying no one plays PVP - I totally get that some players love it just like how I enjoy PVE. What bothers me is the forced participation model where devs make PVE players jump through PVP hoops to earn rewards. Take the recent Deep Dive event for example - why can't we earn the same rewards through our preferred playstyle? This feels like punishing loyal players for their preferences. I apologize to other PVP enthusiasts if my frustration sounded dismissive. But honestly, it's frustrating to see devs prioritize competitive modes over inclusive design.
I just hope the developers would pay more attention to players. Currently, they haven't addressed players' dissatisfaction at all. I want them to explain the reasons behind the adjustments made in the Xingchen Chapter. In my view, these changes have brought mostly negative experiences to players. I hope they can give players an explanation. If you've played the PVE content from last year until now, like I have, you might understand my frustration to some extent.
